search.query: timechart limit=15 span=1m sum(callCount) as count by method_path

(index=production OR index=development) (host="systemtest-*" OR (host="pewpewagent*" source="*app-*pewpew*")) source="*$envSelector$*" sourcetype=fs_json summaryType=bucket method="$methodFilter$" $includeOAuth$ | rex field=url "^https?:\/\/(?<hostname>[^/]+)(?<path>/[^?]+)(\?(?<queryString>.+))?$" | eval hostname=if(hostname="null" OR isnull(hostname),url,hostname) | eval path=if(path="null" OR isnull(path),url,path) | search path="$pathFilter$" | rex field=_raw "\"timestamp\":(?<timestamp>\d+)," | eval _time=timestamp | eval serviceName=replace(hostname,"\.service\.\w+\.us-east-1\.\w+\.fslocal\.org","") | eval serviceName=replace(serviceName,"\.familysearch\.org","") | timechart limit=15 span=1m sum(callCount) as count by serviceName

(index=production OR index=development) (host="systemtest-*" OR (host="pewpewagent*" source="*app-*pewpew*")) source="*$envSelector$*" sourcetype=fs_json summaryType=bucket method="$methodFilter$" $includeOAuth$ | rex field=url "^https?:\/\/(?<hostname>[^/]+)(?<path>/[^?]+)(\?(?<queryString>.+))?$" | eval path=if(path="null" OR isnull(path),url,path) | search path="$pathFilter$" | rex field=_raw "\"timestamp\":(?<timestamp>\d+)," | eval _time=timestamp | timechart limit=15 span=1m sum(callCount) as count by host

(index=production OR index=development) (host="systemtest-*" OR (host="pewpewagent*" source="*app-*pewpew*")) source="*$envSelector$*" sourcetype=fs_json summaryType=bucket method="$methodFilter$" $includeOAuth$ | rex field=url "^https?:\/\/(?<hostname>[^/]+)(?<path>/[^?]+)(\?(?<queryString>.+))?$" | eval path=if(path="null" OR isnull(path),url,path) | search path="$pathFilter$" | rex field=_raw "\"timestamp\":(?<timestamp>\d+)," | eval _time=timestamp | timechart limit=15 span=1m sum(callCount) as count by host

(index=production OR index=development) (host="systemtest-*" OR (host="pewpewagent*" source="*app-*pewpew*")) source="*$envSelector$*" sourcetype=fs_json summaryType=bucket method="$methodFilter$" $includeOAuth$ | rex field=url "^https?:\/\/(?<hostname>[^/]+)(?<path>/[^?]+)(\?(?<queryString>.+))?$" | eval hostname=if(hostname="null" OR isnull(hostname),url,hostname) | eval path=if(path="null" OR isnull(path),url,path) | search path="$pathFilter$" | rex field=_raw "\"timestamp\":(?<timestamp>\d+)," | eval _time=timestamp | eval serviceName=replace(hostname,"\.service\.\w+\.us-east-1\.\w+\.fslocal\.org","") | eval serviceName=replace(serviceName,"\.familysearch\.org","") | timechart limit=15 span=1m sum(callCount) as count by serviceName
